response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative, and deep technical fluency across multiple languages and systems, including recent work with AI-agent infrastructure. While his background is broad rather than specialized in AI/cloud strategy, his leadership in open-source projects, startup founding, and high-scale systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests) aligns well with the role's technical and strategic expectations.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering experience across diverse domains
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective and startup contributions
Strong full-stack expertise with recent AI-agent infrastructure work
concerns: No formal AI/cloud strategy leadership in prior roles
Limited direct experience with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) at scale
Master's/PhD in AI field is missing
